# CamFinTech

> CamFinTech is a Phnom Penh–based **fee-only regulatory approval-navigation and compliance firm**. We get Cambodian and foreign FinTechs **approved** onto Cambodia's Digital Public Infrastructure rails — Bakong/KHQR, CamDX/CamDigiKey, and CamInvoice — and run the AML/CFT and governance programmes that keep them compliant. Technical build is delivered by accredited Service Providers we coordinate; we never hold client funds and never operate a rail. Our moat is ex-NBC, NBFSA, TSC, SERC, and GDT regulator talent — not engineering capacity.

## Operating discipline

- **Fee-only** — professional fees only; no commissions, no transaction cuts, no markups on partner invoices.
- **Never hold client funds** — funds flow through the licensed operator (member bank, licensed PSP), never CamFinTech.
- **Never operate a rail** — the client (or sponsor) remains the licensed operator; we stay in the "assist" ring.
- **Reserved work to licensed partners** — Bar lawyers, GDT tax agents, accredited Service Providers.
- **Process competence, never access** — we market process competence; we don't market relationships.

## Service catalogue (SRV-01 through SRV-11)

CamFinTech offers eleven productised service vectors across four areas, applied across regulated FinTechs (banks, MFIs, PSPs, insurers, securities/crypto, alt-lenders) and rail-using enterprises. Pricing is indicative — every engagement is validated by quote.

### Core Rail Integrations
- [SRV-01 — CamDX / eKYC Enablement](https://www.camfintech.com/#services): Navigate the approval to connect to Cambodia's national identity system; coordinate the integration build with an accredited partner.
- [SRV-02 — Bakong / KHQR Integration](https://www.camfintech.com/#services): Navigate PSP licensing (or member-bank sponsorship); coordinate the technical build for accepting and sending payments on Cambodia's national rails.
- [SRV-03 — CamInvoice Readiness](https://www.camfintech.com/#services): Gap assessment + costed plan against the GDT's CamInvoice rules ahead of the phased B2B mandate.
- [SRV-04 — CamInvoice SP-Enablement](https://www.camfintech.com/#services): Coordinate an accredited Service Provider to connect your ERP/accounting system to CamInvoice.

### Strategic Services
- [SRV-05 — Licensing-Readiness](https://www.camfintech.com/#services): NBC / NBFSA / SERC licence mapping, eligibility gap analysis, application preparation.
- [SRV-06 — Market-Entry Consulting](https://www.camfintech.com/#services): For foreign FinTechs entering Cambodia — entity setup, licensing strategy, end-to-end route onto the government rails.

### Risk & Security
- [SRV-07 — AML-Programme Design](https://www.camfintech.com/#services): CDD/EDD, transaction monitoring, CAFIU reporting, MLRO function design. The named MLRO stays client-side; we run the function around them.
- [SRV-08 — Security / Pentesting](https://www.camfintech.com/#services): Security reviews and penetration tests aligned to NBC's TCRMG expectations — routed to an accredited security firm we coordinate.
- [SRV-09 — Data-Protection Protocols](https://www.camfintech.com/#services): Consent, retention, processor governance, DPO-support ahead of Cambodia's Personal Data Protection Law.
- [SRV-11 — DASP Approval-Readiness](https://www.camfintech.com/products/dasp): **Flagship.** End-to-end readiness for SERC's Prakas 093 digital-asset licensing regime (in force 30 December 2025). Productised as DASP-DX/BUILD/RUN/TRAIN.

### Enablement
- [SRV-10 — Operational Training](https://www.camfintech.com/#services): Hands-on training so your team can operate the rails, follow the compliance steps, and run the programme after handover.

## Flagship product — DASP Approval-Readiness

- **DASP-DX** (Diagnostic) — paid readiness diagnostic + integrity STOP-gate qualifier. Indicative: US$8k–25k, 2–3 weeks.
- **DASP-BUILD** (Flagship) — AML/CFT programme + governance + sandbox-readiness + full application pack. Indicative: US$45k–75k (wallet) / US$90k–160k+ (full exchange/custody), 4–8 months.
- **DASP-RUN** (Managed compliance) — post-approval retainer. Indicative: US$2k–8k/month.
- **DASP-TRAIN** (Capability transfer) — operational training cohorts. Indicative: US$5k–15k per cohort.

Full product detail: https://www.camfintech.com/products/dasp

## What CamFinTech does NOT do

- Hold client funds or operate any rail
- Write the integration code — that's our accredited partners (BanhJi, Innolab/Odoo, MAQSU, SAP/Crimson, KOSIGN, Metfone, GK-Smart)
- Lobby, trade on contacts, or sell "access"
- Take a cut of your transactions
- Promise an outcome we can't control
- Operate as a named MLRO (must be a board-appointed individual of the licensed entity)
- File submissions on the client's behalf (the licensed operator is the applicant of record)

## The Cambodian DPI rails CamFinTech navigates

- **Bakong** — Cambodia's central bank digital currency (CBDC) and instant payment system operated by the National Bank of Cambodia (NBC). Real-time settlement via the KHQR QR code standard.
- **KHQR** — Standardized QR payment protocol for the Bakong ecosystem, enabling interoperable payments.
- **CamDigiKey** — Cambodia's national digital identity system enabling eKYC verification.
- **CamDX** — National data exchange platform providing government-private sector interoperability (operated by TSC under Sub-Decree 207).
- **CamInvoice** — Mandatory electronic invoicing system administered by the General Department of Taxation (GDT).
- **CamDL** — Back-end attestation dependency (NOT a sellable rail; out of scope for direct integration).

## Regulator landscape

- **NBC** (National Bank of Cambodia) — banking, payment system, AML/CFT, foreign exchange.
- **NBFSA** (Non-Bank Financial Services Authority) — non-bank financial institutions, MFIs, leasing, securities (some overlap with SERC).
- **TSC** (Techo Startup Center) — CamDX / CamDigiKey operator.
- **SERC** (Securities and Exchange Regulator of Cambodia) — digital assets (Prakas 093), securities.
- **GDT** (General Department of Taxation) — CamInvoice, tax compliance.
- **MEF** (Ministry of Economy and Finance) — fiscal, oversight.
- **MPTC** (Ministry of Post and Telecommunications) — telecoms, root-CA / PKI.
- **CAFIU** (Cambodia Financial Intelligence Unit) — FIU reporting destination.

## Honesty discipline

- **Pricing is indicative.** Every figure is a planning estimate, validated by quote at engagement scoping.
- **Some mandates are anticipatory.** CamInvoice B2B is phased (~2026–2027, announced but not gazetted) and the Personal Data Protection Law is not yet promulgated. We help clients get *ahead* of these; we never claim they're already in breach.
- **No fabricated case studies.** CamFinTech is pre-revenue and early. Pre-logo proof discipline: founder track record, methodology walk-throughs, and conspicuously-labelled illustrative scenarios. Real consented case studies are surfaced only when they exist.
- **Every regulatory claim graded [S] sourced / [A] assumption / [V] verify** internally.
- **No grace window claimed for Prakas 093.** No published grace period exists; we will not manufacture urgency.

## Reference content

- [Glossary](https://www.camfintech.com/glossary) — definitional pages for Bakong, CamDigiKey, CamDX, CamInvoice, KHQR, GaaP, NBC, GDT, supply chain finance, embedded insurance.
- [Learn](https://www.camfintech.com/learn) — factual explainers: how Bakong works, what CamDigiKey is, how CamDX works, what CamInvoice is, how to accept KHQR, what Cambodia's GaaP is.

## Sibling publication — The Riel Report

CamFinTech is also the publisher of [The Riel Report](https://riel.report) — Cambodia FinTech intelligence read by the financial-services industry, regulators, and multilateral analysts. Separate brand at its own domain. No replicated content on camfintech.com; cross-reference at [/publication](https://www.camfintech.com/publication).

## Voluntary TCRMG-2026 compliance posture

CamFinTech voluntarily holds its own operations to NBC's Technology and Cyber Risk Management Guidelines (TCRMG 2026) standards — even as a non-BFI. Posture documentation available on request for BFI procurement conversations.
